text:
3. HATOYAMA-CHOU MEETING MAY BE IN OFFING

Both Chou and Hatoyama have expressed a desire to meet to discuss common problems, particularly the question of official relations. Chou recently told a visiting Japanese delegation that the Chinese Communists "would reserve Peiping airport exclusively" for Hatoyama if he should visit China
